==Pokémon==
This listing is of Shauna's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}:

{{TrainerPoké
|main=yes
|trainer=Shauna
|pkmn=Ivysaur
|stage1=Bulbasaur
|type1=Grass
|type2=Poison
|img=Shauna Ivysaur.png
|epnum=XY039
|epname=Summer of Discovery!
|vajp=Inuko Inuyama
|vaen=List of English voice actors{{!}}Justin Anselmi
|desc={{p|Bulbasaur}} is the [[first partner Pokémon]] Shauna received from {{an|Professor Sycamore}}. It was used multiple times in the [[Pokémon Summer Camp]]. During one of the camp's activities, it took part in a [[Multi Battle|Team Battle]] against [[Ash's Pikachu]], [[Serena's Fennekin]], and [[Clemont's Chespin]] alongside {{an|Tierno}}'s {{p|Squirtle}} and [[Trevor's Charmander]].

It is Shauna's signature Pokémon and it is used in many [[Pokémon Showcase]]s. It reappeared in ''[[XY090|Tag Team Battle Inspiration!]]'' as an {{p|Ivysaur}}, where it battled against Ash's Pikachu and [[Tierno's Blastoise]] along with [[Serena's Eevee]].}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Shauna
|pkmn=Flabébé
|type1=Fairy
|gender=female
|img=Shauna Flabébé.png
|epnum=XY039
|epname=Summer of Discovery!
|desc=Shauna's [[List of Pokémon with form differences#Flabébé, Floette, and Florges|Orange Flower]] {{p|Flabébé}} made an early cameo in ''[[XY039|Summer of Discovery!]]'' as one of the Pokémon she recorded a [[Pokévision]] with. She made her first physical appearance in ''[[XY060|A Showcase Debut!]]'', where she, along with Bulbasaur, helped Shauna to win the {{ci|Coumarine}} {{pkmn|Showcase}} Rookie Class.

She reappeared in ''[[XY064|Battling With Elegance and a Big Smile!]]'' in a video. She was seen again in ''[[XY091|A Performance Pop Quiz!]]'', where she performed along with Ivysaur and Shauna during the {{ci|Anistar}} Showcase Rookie Class.

Flabébé was used in the semifinals of the {{ci|Gloire}} Showcase Master Class in ''[[XY113|Performing a Pathway to the Future!]]'' along with Ivysaur. Their performance wasn't impressive enough and they ended up receiving fewer votes than [[Serena's Pancham]] and {{TP|Serena|Sylveon}}, thus eliminating Shauna from the tournament.

Flabébé's known moves are {{m|Fairy Wind}} and {{m|Moonblast}}.}}
